items.title: Riješite se puževa u vrtu uz pomoć jedne namirnice
items.summary: Puževi se smatraju među najnepoželjnijim vrtnim štetnicima, a vrtlari ih se mogu brzo i učinkovito riješiti uz pomoć jednostavnog prirodnog sastojka.

items.title: Massive study links teen marijuana use to double the risk of serious mental illness
items.summary: Teens who use cannabis may face a substantially greater risk of developing serious mental health conditions, including psychotic and bipolar disorders, according to a study of more than 463,000 adolescents. Researchers found cannabis use often preceded these diagnoses by nearly two years, strengthen

items.title: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer
items.summary: Researchers have identified a vitamin B12–based compound that can cross the blood-brain barrier and home in on glioblastoma tumors. In animal studies, the compound accumulated preferentially in tumor tissue and delivered sustained nitric oxide directly to cancer cells. It also worked synergistically

items.title: Scientists discover what triggers belly fat as we age
items.summary: Aging may trigger the appearance of specialized stem cells that supercharge the body's ability to create new belly fat. The discovery reveals a potential biological driver of middle-age weight gain and a promising target for future anti-obesity treatments.

items.title: Endokrinolozi otkrili zašto je brokula jedan od najboljih izbora za zdrav metabolizam
items.summary: BROKULA je idealno povrće za metaboličko zdravlje.

items.summary: UPOZORIO je na opasnosti samodijagnostike raka putem interneta.

items.title: Istraživanje: Pet minuta dnevno može značajno smanjiti rizik od moždanog udara
items.summary: NOVA studija pokazuje da mjerenje krvnog tlaka kod kuće i slanje podataka liječniku smanjuje rizik od moždanog udara i zatajenja srca.

items.title: Šesteročlana obitelj odlučila živjeti u bunkeru vrijednom 300.000 dolara: Ima 557 četvornih metara i zidove debele 60 centimetara
items.summary: Dok većina ljudi bunkere povezuje s ratovima i katastrofama, jedna američka obitelj odlučila je upravo u takvom prostoru započeti potpuno novo životno
